title: PDF Viewer auto fit-to-width
description:
PDF Viewer sheets now auto-scale to fill the available panel width edge-to-edge. Fit uses the full board body width (not shrink-wrapped scroll), refits on window/panel resize via ResizeObserver, and clips iframe overflow to prevent the right-edge duplicate bleed.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (dbg61).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Viewer: auto fit-to-width on load, workspace switch, and panel resize.
Measure avail width from full panel, not shrink-wrapped scroll.
ResizeObserver refits sheets when screen size changes.
Clip page media overflow; hide horizontal scroll.
